install: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y php8.3-cli php8.3-common php8.3-mbstring php8.3-sqlite3 php8.3-xml php8.3-curl php8.3-zip php8.3-bcmath php8.3-intl composer && cd /workspace/platform/backend && [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env && composer install --no-interaction --no-progress --prefer-dist && php artisan key:generate --ansi && cd /workspace/platform/orchestrator && [ -f .env ] || cp .env.example .env && composer install --no-interaction --no-progress --prefer-dist && php artisan key:generate --ansi
